page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: The Pypgatk framework and library provides a set of tools to perform ProteoGenomics Analysis.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: pypgatk is a Python library part of the ProteoGenomics Analysis Toolkit. It provides different bioinformatics tools for proteogenomics data analysis
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: pypgatk is a Python library part of the ProteoGenomics Analysis Toolkit. It provides different bioinformatics tools for proteogenomics data analysis
